plugin.name: advanced_speedwalk
plugin.author: Oona
plugin.purpose: chain together advanced commands for more complex speedwalks
plugin.description:
This plugin allows you to create advanced speedwalks that can interact with the mapper, run specific distances, search areas until something is found, unlock doors, cast spells, kill specific targets, loot specific items, peek into rooms, wait for a specified time, and display message boxes. You can define speedwalks using a combination of these commands and execute them with a single command.
Make sure you have the speedwalk_miniwindow.lua, serializationhelper.lua, and consthelper.lua files in your lua directory and GMCP is enabled if you want the mapper to work correctly.
To view all available speedwalks, you can use the command: - aspd
To use the plugin, you can start a speedwalk by name with the command: - aspd <speedwalk>
Run multiple speedwalks one after the other by separating them with a space: - aspd <speedwalk1> <speedwalk2> ...
A window will appear showing the current status of the speedwalk, including any items that have been seen and/or collected during the speedwalk.
Manage the currently running speedwalk with the following commands: - aspd cancel : Cancels the current speedwalk. - aspd pause : Pauses the current speedwalk. - aspd resume : Resumes a paused speedwalk.
You can also create new speedwalks or manage existing ones using the following commands: - aspd new : Opens a mini-window to create a new speedwalk. - aspd edit : Opens a mini-window to edit the speedwalk.
Step types: - Execute: + Send a single command to the MUD + Can repeat 0 to 9 times + Use a semicolon to add many at a time (s;e;n;get key trunk;n;put key trunk) + Advances to the next step immediately
- Mapper: + Uses the mapper plugin to go to a specific room + Advances to the next step after arriving + If the mapper gets stuck, using the 'mapper resume' command should get you back on track
- Run: + Uses the run command to run to a specific location or in a specific direction + Advances to the next step after stopping at the destination + Will account to getting attacked or buffeted on water mid run and course correct
- Distance: + Just like the run command above but will stop after moving a specified number of runs + Advances to the next step when the number is hit + Will course correct just like run does
- Search: + Uses the search command to look for hidden doors in a direction + Advances to the next step when the hidden door has been found + Using this in a room without a hidden exit is probably going to gunk it up
- Unlock: + Will cast magic unlock in the direction specified + Advances to the next step when the door is unlocked + Probably just use the Cast step below, especially if you are psionic
- Kill: + Kills the specified mob by using the kill command with a keyword + Advances to the next step when the mob is slain
- Loot: + Kills the specified mob to get a specified item, the item should be the exact short description + Advances when the specified item has been looted + This isn't as implemented as I want, eventually it will keep attacking and watch for respawn
- Peek: + Looks in the direction specified, opening any doors if needed. + Advances to the next step immediately + Useful for checking rooms for scatter items without entering + Should probably pause if it find something, I'll add that later
- Wait: + Advances to the next step after the specific number of seconds
- Prompt: + Shows a message box with a specified message + Advances to the next step on a "yes" response + Pauses the speedwalk on a "no" response
- Pause: + Immediately pauses the speedwalk with an optional message. + Advances to the next step when using "aspd resume" or clicking the resume button
- Cast: + Casts the spell you specify + Will recast when you lose your concentration + Advances to the next step on successful cast.
Each step has a delay of .3 seconds. Will probably make this configurable in the future.

trigger.match: ^Your travel abruptly comes to a halt\.$
^You are buffeted to the (.*?) by crosswinds\!$
^The (.*?) glows a brilliant blue, then fades.$
^(.*?) blocks you as you try to escape\!$
^(.*?) grabs ahold of your shoulders\, and pulls you back towards it\!$
^(.*?) large\, completely smooth\, dark crystal orb is here(.*?)$
^(.*?)The jagged shard of a dark crystal orb lies on the ground\.$
^(.*?)This single sheet of paper has been deserted\.$
^(.*?)t least for the moment\, this (.*?) wallet has nobody paying attention to it(.*?)$
^(.*?)manual emits a bright flare of white light as you take it and it binds with you\.$
^You take a shard of an orb of Vandemaar\.$
^A lost wallet emits a bright flare of white light as you take it and it binds with you\.
^Your disembodied soul rises from your ravaged corpse\.$

muclient.script:
require "gmcphelper"
local serializer_installed, serialization_helper = pcall(require, "serializationhelper") local can_create, speedwalk_editor = pcall(require, "speedwalk_miniwindow") local const_installed, consts = pcall(require, "consthelper")
if not serializer_installed then ColourNote("black", "red", "The Advanced Speedwalk plugin requires the serializationhelper.lua script to be installed.") return end
if not can_create then ColourNote("black", "red", "The Advanced Speedwalk plugin requires the speedwalk_miniwindow.lua script to be installed.") return end
if not const_installed then ColourNote("black", "red", "The Advanced Speedwalk plugin requires the consthelper.lua script to be installed.") return end
local WIN = "aspd_" .. GetPluginID() local FONT = WIN .. "_font" local INFO_FONT = WIN .. "_info_font"
local all_speedwalks = {} local is_speedwalking = false local active_speedwalk = nil local current_step = 0 local is_paused = false
local mapper_room = nil local run_direction = nil local run_direction_count = nil local attacked_during_run = false local buffeted_direction = nil local search_direction = nil local search_found = false local unlock_direction = nil local casting_spell = nil local loot_item = nil
local orb_seen, orb_taken = 0 local manual_seen, manual_taken = 0 local shard_seen, shard_taken = 0 local parchment_seen, parchment_taken = 0 local wallet_seen, wallet_taken = 0
local border_width = GetInfo(277) local char_width, char_height, info_char_height, button_height local header_text, cancel_text = "Advanced Speedwalk", "Cancel" local pause_text, resume_text = "Pause", "Resume" local header_width, cancel_width, pause_width, resume_width local window_width, window_height local left_button_width, right_button_width
function OnPluginInstall() initButton() loadSpeedwalks() end
function OnPluginClose() pluginStop() end function OnPluginDisable() pluginStop() end function OnPluginDisconnect() pluginStop() end
function OnPluginBroadcast(msg, id, name, text) if (id =="f67c4339ed0591a5b010d05b" and is_speedwalking and text == "room.info") then checkMapperStep() end end
function pluginStop() if is_speedwalking then finishSpeedwalk() end
if can_create then speedwalk_editor.hide() end end
function loadSpeedwalks() all_speedwalks = serialization_helper.GetSerializedVariable("advanced_speedwalks", {}) if all_speedwalks == nil then all_speedwalks = {} end local has_some = false for name, steps in pairs(all_speedwalks) do has_some = true break end if not has_some then Note("There are no saved advanced speedwalks. Use 'aspd new' to create one.") end end
function startSpeedwalk(speedwalk_id) speedwalk_id = Trim(speedwalk_id or ""):lower() if speedwalk_id == "" then showAllSpeedwalks() elseif speedwalk_id == "help" then showHelp() elseif speedwalk_id == "cancel" then finishSpeedwalk() elseif speedwalk_id == "pause" then pauseSpeedwalk() elseif speedwalk_id == "resume" then resumeSpeedwalk() elseif speedwalk_id == "new" then createNewSpeedwalk() elseif speedwalk_id:sub(1, 4) == "edit" then edit(speedwalk_id:sub(5, #speedwalk_id)) else if speedwalk_id:find(" ") then local concat = {} for id in speedwalk_id:gmatch("%S+") do local sw = all_speedwalks[id] if not sw then Note("There is not a speedwalk called " .. id .. ".") return end for _, step in ipairs(sw) do table.insert(concat, step) end end active_speedwalk = concatSpeedwalks(all_speedwalks, step, unpack(concat)) else active_speedwalk = all_speedwalks[speedwalk_id] end if not active_speedwalk then Note("There is not a speedwalk called " .. speedwalk_id .. ".") else beginSpeedwalk(1) end end end
function beginSpeedwalk(start_step) is_speedwalking = true updateButtons() resetVariables(true)
start_step = tonumber(Trim(start_step or "")) if start_step and start_step > 0 and start_step < #active_speedwalk then current_step = start_step - 1 end
EnableTriggerGroup("advanced_speedwalking", true) advanceToNextStep() end
function advanceToNextStep() if not is_paused and is_speedwalking then resetVariables(false) current_step = current_step + 1 local step = active_speedwalk[current_step] if not step then finishSpeedwalk() else DoAfterSpecial(0.3, "handleAdvancement()", sendto.script) end end end
function handleAdvancement() if is_speedwalking then local step = active_speedwalk[current_step] if step:sub(1, 1) == "~" then handleSpecialStep(step) else Execute(step) advanceToNextStep() end end end
function resetVariables(all) if all then orb_seen, manual_seen, shard_seen = 0, 0, 0 orb_taken, manual_taken, shard_taken = 0, 0, 0 parchment_seen, wallet_seen, current_step = 0, 0, 0 parchment_taken, wallet_taken = 0, 0 is_paused = false end
mapper_room, run_direction, run_direction_count = nil, nil, nil buffeted_direction, search_direction, search_found = nil, nil, nil unlock_direction, casting_spell, loot_item = nil, nil, nil attacked_during_run = false EnableTriggerGroup("run_step", false) EnableTriggerGroup("search_step", false) EnableTriggerGroup("unlock_step", false) EnableTriggerGroup("cast_step", false) EnableTriggerGroup("kill_step", false) EnableTriggerGroup("loot_step", false) end
function handleSpecialStep(step) if #step < 3 then ColourNote("red", "black", "There was an error with the following speedwalk step: " .. step) else local tag = step:sub(2, 2) local val = step:sub(3, #step)
if tag == "m" then handleMapperStep(val) elseif tag == "r" then handleRunStep(val) elseif tag == "d" then handleDistanceStep(val) elseif tag == "s" then handleSearchStep(val) elseif tag == "u" then handleUnlockStep(val) elseif tag == "k" then handleKillStep(val) elseif tag == "l" then handleLootStep(val) elseif tag == "p" then handlePeekStep(val) elseif tag == "w" then handleWaitStep(val) elseif tag == "x" then handleMessageBoxStep(val) elseif tag == "z" then pauseSpeedwalk(val) elseif tag == "c" then handleCastStep(val) else local repeat_count = tonumber(tag) if repeat_count == nil then ColourNote("red", "black", "Unknown tag: " .. tag) else handleRepeatStep(val, repeat_count) end end end end
function handleMapperStep(target_room) local current_room = getGmcpRoomNumber() if current_room == target_room then advanceToNextStep() else mapperGoto(target_room) end end
function mapperGoto(room) mapper_room = room Execute("mapper goto " .. room) end
function checkMapperStep() if mapper_room then local current_room = getGmcpRoomNumber() if current_room == mapper_room then mapper_room = nil advanceToNextStep() else Note("Speedwalk is waiting for room " .. active_speedwalk[current_step] .. "... Try 'mapper resume' if you are stuck or 'aspd cancel' to cancel.") end end end
function handleRunStep(dir) run_direction = dir buffeted_direction = nil EnableTriggerGroup("run_step", true) Execute("run " .. dir) end
function handleDistanceStep(dir_and_count) local dir, count = splitTwo(dir_and_count) run_direction_count = tonumber(count) handleRunStep(dir) end
function checkRunStep(dir) if not dir or dir == "" then if not buffeted_direction and not attacked_during_run then advanceToNextStep() elseif buffeted_direction then correctRunAfterBuffet() end else buffeted_direction = dir end end
function checkDistanceStep() if run_direction_count ~= nil then run_direction_count = run_direction_count - 1 if run_direction_count <= 0 then run_direction_count = nil Execute("run cancel") end end end
function correctRunAfterBuffet() if buffeted_direction == "north" then Execute("south") elseif buffeted_direction == "northeast" then Execute("southwest") elseif buffeted_direction == "east" then Execute("west") elseif buffeted_direction == "southeast" then Execute("northwest") elseif buffeted_direction == "south" then Execute("north") elseif buffeted_direction == "southwest" then Execute("northeast") elseif buffeted_direction == "west" then Execute("east") elseif buffeted_direction == "northwest" then Execute("southeast") end
handleRunStep(run_direction) end
function attackedDuringRun(attacked) attacked_during_run = attacked if not attacked then -- ne, sw, w, e, e, w, s, pw, e, w, se, nw, 330869, 330871, ne, sw, se DoAfterSpecial(2, "handleRunStep(\"" .. run_direction .. "\")", sendto.script)
-- beltane has unsouthwest and mulkanthanos needs to mapper to 3900588 before running xalt end end
function handleSearchStep(dir) EnableTriggerGroup("search_step", true) search_direction = dir search_found = false Execute("search " .. dir) end
function checkSearchStep(found) if not found and search_found then -- do nothing, we did the thing already elseif found then search_found = true advanceToNextStep() else Execute("search " .. search_direction) end end
function handleUnlockStep(dir) EnableTriggerGroup("unlock_step", true) unlock_direction = dir Execute("cast 'magic unlock' " .. dir) -- TODO: allow using knock instead end
function checkUnlockStep(success) if not success then handleUnlockStep(unlock_direction) else advanceToNextStep() end end
function handleCastStep(spell) EnableTriggerGroup("cast_step", true) casting_spell = spell Execute("cast '" .. spell .. "'") end
function checkCastStep(success) if not success then handleCastStep(casting_spell) else advanceToNextStep() end end
function handleKillStep(target) EnableTriggerGroup("kill_step", true) Execute("kill " .. target) end
function checkKillStep() advanceToNextStep() end
function handleLootStep(targets) EnableTriggerGroup("loot_step", true) local mob, item = splitTwo(targets)
loot_item = item Execute("kill " .. target) end
function checkLootStep(item) if item:lower() == item:lower() then advanceToNextStep() end end
function handlePeekStep(direction) Send("open " .. direction) Send("look " .. direction) advanceToNextStep() end
function handleWaitStep(duration) DoAfterSpecial(tonumber(duration), "advanceToNextStep()", sendto.script) end
function handleMessageBoxStep(text) local result = utils.msgbox(text, "Advanced Speedwalk", "yesno", "?") if result == "yes" then advanceToNextStep() else pauseSpeedwalk() end end
function handleRepeatStep(command, repeat_count) local wait_time = 0.3 for t = 1, repeat_count do DoAfter(wait_time, command) wait_time = wait_time + 0.3 end
DoAfterSpecial(wait_time + .3, "advanceToNextStep()", sendto.script) end
function finishSpeedwalk() WindowShow(WIN, false) is_speedwalking = false EnableTriggerGroup("advanced_speedwalking", false) DoAfterSpecial(.25, "report()", sendto.script) end
function fleeBlocked() Execute("mapper resume") end
function report() if orb_seen == 0 and shard_seen == 0 and wallet_seen == 0 and manual_seen == 0 and parchment_seen == 0 then Note("Speedwalk finished, no scatter items were seen.") else Note("Speedwalk finished, the following scatter items were seen:")
if orb_seen > 0 then ColourTell("cyan", "black", " * ") ColourTell("white", "black", tostring(orb_seen)) if orb_seen == 1 then Tell(" orb of Vandemaar") else Tell(" orbs of Vandemaar") end if orb_taken < orb_seen then ColourTell("red", "black", " " .. orb_taken .. " of " .. orb_seen) if orb_taken == 1 then ColourTell("red", "black", " was picked up!") else ColourTell("red", "black", " were picked up!") end end Note() end
if shard_seen > 0 then ColourTell("cyan", "black", " * ") ColourTell("white", "black", tostring(shard_seen)) if shard_seen == 1 then Tell(" shard of an orb of Vandemaar") else Tell(" shards of an orb of Vandemaar") end if shard_taken < shard_seen then ColourTell("red", "black", " " .. shard_taken .. " of " .. shard_seen) if shard_taken == 1 then ColourTell("red", "black", " was picked up!") else ColourTell("red", "black", " were picked up!") end end Note() end
if wallet_seen > 0 then ColourTell("cyan", "black", " * ") ColourTell("white", "black", tostring(wallet_seen)) if wallet_seen == 1 then Tell(" lost wallet") else Tell(" lost wallets") end if wallet_taken < wallet_seen then ColourTell("red", "black", " " .. wallet_taken .. " of " .. wallet_seen) if wallet_taken == 1 then ColourTell("red", "black", " was picked up!") else ColourTell("red", "black", " were picked up!") end end Note() end
if manual_seen > 0 then ColourTell("cyan", "black", " * ") ColourTell("white", "black", tostring(manual_seen)) if manual_seen == 1 then Tell(" skill manual") else Tell(" skill manuals") end if manual_taken < manual_seen then ColourTell("red", "black", " " .. manual_taken .. " of " .. manual_seen) if manual_taken == 1 then ColourTell("red", "black", " was picked up!") else ColourTell("red", "black", " were picked up!") end end Note() end
if parchment_seen > 0 then ColourTell("cyan", "black", " * ") ColourTell("white", "black", tostring(parchment_seen)) if parchment_seen == 1 then Tell(" didactic parchment") else Tell(" didactic parchments") end if parchment_taken < parchment_seen then ColourTell("red", "black", " " .. parchment_taken .. " of " .. parchment_seen) if parchment_taken == 1 then ColourTell("red", "black", " was picked up!") else ColourTell("red", "black", " were picked up!") end end Note() end end resetVariables(true) SendNoEcho("") end
function sawOrb() Execute("mapper stop") Execute("get orb") orb_seen = orb_seen + 1 Execute("mapper resume") updateButtons() end
function sawManual() Execute("mapper stop") Execute("get manual") manual_seen = manual_seen + 1 Execute("mapper resume") updateButtons() end
function sawShard() Execute("mapper stop") Execute("get shard") shard_seen = shard_seen + 1 Execute("mapper resume") updateButtons() end
function sawParchment() Execute("mapper stop") Execute("get parchment") parchment_seen = parchment_seen + 1 Execute("mapper resume") updateButtons() end
function sawWallet() Execute("mapper stop") Execute("get wallet") wallet_seen = wallet_seen + 1 Execute("mapper resume") updateButtons() end
function gotOrb() orb_taken = orb_taken + 1 updateButtons() end
function gotManual() manual_taken = manual_taken + 1 updateButtons() end
function gotShard() shard_taken = shard_taken + 1 updateButtons() end
function gotParchment() parchment_taken = parchment_taken + 1 updateButtons() end
function gotWallet() wallet_taken = wallet_taken + 1 updateButtons() end
function pauseSpeedwalk(msg) if is_speedwalking and not is_paused then is_paused = true updateButtons() if msg and msg ~= "" then Note(msg) else Note("Speedwalk paused. Click 'Resume' to continue.") end end end
function initButton() WindowCreate(WIN, 0, 0, 50, 50, miniwin.pos_center_all, 0, 0) WindowSetZOrder(WIN, 9999) WindowFont(WIN, FONT, "Lucida Console", 12) WindowFont(WIN, INFO_FONT, "Lucida Console", 8)
char_width = WindowTextWidth(WIN, FONT, "X") char_height = WindowFontInfo(WIN, FONT, 1) + 2 info_char_height = WindowFontInfo(WIN, INFO_FONT, 1) + 2 button_height = char_height * 3 + (border_width * 2)
header_width, cancel_width = char_width * #header_text, char_width * #cancel_text pause_width, resume_width = char_width * #pause_text, char_width * #resume_text left_button_width = cancel_width + (border_width * 2) + (char_width * 4) right_button_width = resume_width + (border_width * 2) + (char_width * 4) window_width = left_button_width + border_width + right_button_width window_height = button_height + (info_char_height * 5) + (border_width * 4)
WindowResize(WIN, window_width, window_height, 0) WindowPosition(WIN, 0, 0, miniwin.pos_center_all, 0)
WindowShow(WIN, false) end
function updateButtons() WindowShow(WIN, false)
if is_speedwalking then local right_button_text, right_button_color, right_button_id, right_button_callback = pause_text, ColourNameToRGB("orange"), "pause_button", "pause_buttonClick" if is_paused then right_button_text, right_button_color, right_button_id, right_button_callback = resume_text, ColourNameToRGB("green"), "resume_button", "resume_buttonClick" end
WindowDeleteAllHotspots(WIN)
addButton(0, 0, left_button_width, ColourNameToRGB("red"), cancel_text, "cancel_button", "cancel_buttonClick") addButton(left_button_width + border_width, 0, right_button_width, right_button_color, right_button_text, right_button_id, right_button_callback)
WindowRectOp(WIN, miniwin.rect_fill, 0, button_height + border_width, window_width, window_height, ColourNameToRGB("black")) for i = 0, border_width do WindowRectOp(WIN, miniwin.rect_frame, i, button_height + border_width + i, window_width - i, window_height - i, ColourNameToRGB("silver")) end
addInfo(border_width * 3, button_height + border_width * 2 + 2, orb_seen, orb_taken, "Orb") addInfo(border_width * 3, button_height + border_width * 2 + 2 + info_char_height, shard_seen, shard_taken, "Fragment") addInfo(border_width * 3, button_height + border_width * 2 + 2 + info_char_height * 2, manual_seen, manual_taken, "Manual") addInfo(border_width * 3, button_height + border_width * 2 + 2 + info_char_height * 3, parchment_seen, parchment_taken, "Parchment") addInfo(border_width * 3, button_height + border_width * 2 + 2 + info_char_height * 4, wallet_seen, wallet_taken, "Wallet")
WindowShow(WIN, true) end end
function addButton(x, y, width, color, text, id, callback) local text_left = x + border_width + char_width local text_top = y + button_height / 2 - char_height / 2
WindowRectOp(WIN, miniwin.rect_fill, x, y, x + width, y + button_height, color) for i = 0, border_width do WindowRectOp(WIN, miniwin.rect_frame, x + i, y + i, x + width - i, y + button_height - i, ColourNameToRGB("silver")) end
for i = 1, #text do text_left = text_left + char_width createShadowCharacter(text:sub(i,i), text_left, text_top) end
WindowAddHotspot(WIN, id, x + border_width, y + border_width, x + width - border_width * 2, y + button_height - border_width * 2, "", "", "", "", callback, "", miniwin.cursor_hand, 0) end
function addInfo(x, y, seen, taken, name) seen = seen or 0 taken = taken or 0 local text = name .. ": " .. (seen or 0) .. " seen. " .. (taken or 0) .. " taken." local color = ColourNameToRGB("white") if seen > taken then color = ColourNameToRGB("red") elseif seen > 0 then color = ColourNameToRGB("green") end WindowText(WIN, INFO_FONT, text, x, y, 0, 0, color, true) end
function createShadowCharacter(character, x, y) WindowText(WIN, FONT, character, x + 2, y + 2, 0, 0, ColourNameToRGB("darkred"), true)
WindowText(WIN, FONT, character, x, y - 1, 0, 0, ColourNameToRGB("black"), true) WindowText(WIN, FONT, character, x, y, 0, 0, ColourNameToRGB("black"), true) WindowText(WIN, FONT, character, x, y + 1, 0, 0, ColourNameToRGB("black"), true)
WindowText(WIN, FONT, character, x + 1, y + 1, 0, 0, ColourNameToRGB("white"), true) end
function createNewSpeedwalk() if is_speedwalking then Note("You are already speedwalking. Please cancel the current speedwalk before starting a new one.") else speedwalk_editor.show() end end
function cancel_buttonClick(flags, hostspot_id) Note("Speedwalk canceled at step " .. current_step .. ".") finishSpeedwalk() end
function pause_buttonClick(flags, hostspot_id) pauseSpeedwalk() end
function resume_buttonClick(flags, hostspot_id) is_paused = false updateButtons() advanceToNextStep() end
function getGmcpRoomNumber() local res, gmcparg = CallPlugin("f67c4339ed0591a5b010d05b", "gmcpval", "room.info") luastmt = "gmcpdata = " .. gmcparg assert(loadstring(luastmt or ""))() return gmcpval("num") end
function splitTwo(input) local parts = {} local i = 1 local len = #input
local function skipSpaces() while i <= len and input:sub(i,i):match("%s") do i = i + 1 end end
local function parseQuoted(quote) i = i + 1 local start = i local out = {}
while i <= len do local c = input:sub(i,i) if c == "\\" and i < len then table.insert(out, input:sub(i+1,i+1)) i = i + 2 elseif c == quote then i = i + 1 break else table.insert(out, c) i = i + 1 end end
return table.concat(out) end
local function parseWord() local start = i while i <= len and not input:sub(i,i):match("%s") do i = i + 1 end return input:sub(start, i-1) end
skipSpaces()
if i <= len then local c = input:sub(i,i) if c == '"' or c == "'" then parts[1] = parseQuoted(c) else parts[1] = parseWord() end end
skipSpaces()
if i <= len then local c = input:sub(i,i) if c == '"' or c == "'" then parts[2] = parseQuoted(c) else parts[2] = input:sub(i):match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") end end
return parts[1], parts[2] end
function concatSpeedwalks(speedwalks, start, ...) local result = {}
local function push(value) result[#result + 1] = value end
start = tonumber(start) or 1
for i, item in ipairs({...}) do if i >= start then if type(item) == "string" and speedwalks[item] then for _, v in ipairs(speedwalks[item]) do push(v) end else push(item) end end end
return result end
function showAllSpeedwalks() local longest_name = getLongestName() local total_speedwalks = 0 local total_steps = 0 if longest_name == 0 then Note("There are no saved speedwalks. Use 'aspd new' to create one.") else Note("." .. string.rep("-", longest_name + 2) .. "." .. string.rep("-", 7) .. "." .. string.rep("-", 12) .. ".") Tell("| ") ColourTell("magenta", "black", "Name") Tell(string.rep(" ", longest_name - 4) .. " | ") ColourTell("magenta", "black", "Steps") Note(" |" .. string.rep(" ", 12) .. "|") Note("." .. string.rep("-", longest_name + 2) .. "." .. string.rep("-", 7) .. "." .. string.rep("-", 12) .. "|")
for name, steps in pairs(all_speedwalks) do local step_count = tostring(#steps) .. string.rep(" ", 5 - #tostring(#steps)) Tell("| ") Hyperlink("!!" .. GetPluginID() .. ":startSpeedwalk(" .. name .. ")", name, "Start", "white", "black", false) Tell(string.rep(" ", longest_name - #name) .. " | ") ColourTell("cyan", "black", step_count ) Tell(" | ") Hyperlink("!!" .. GetPluginID() .. ":edit(" .. name .. ")", "edit", "Edit", "yellow", "black", false) ColourTell("gray", "black", " - ") Hyperlink("!!" .. GetPluginID() .. ":delete(" .. name .. ")", "del", "Delete", "red", "black", false) Note(" |") total_speedwalks = total_speedwalks + 1 total_steps = total_steps + #steps end Note("." .. string.rep("-", longest_name + 2) .. "." .. string.rep("-", 7) .. "." .. string.rep("-", 12) .. ".") Tell("| ") local total_count = tostring(total_speedwalks) ColourTell("white", "black", "Total: " .. total_count .. string.rep(" ", longest_name - #total_count - 7)) Tell(" | ") local total_step_count = tostring(total_steps) .. string.rep(" ", 5 - #tostring(total_steps)) ColourTell("cyan", "black", total_step_count) Tell(" | ") Hyperlink("!!" .. GetPluginID() .. ":createNewSpeedwalk()", "create new", "Create New", "green", "black", false) Note(" |") Note("." .. string.rep("-", longest_name + 2) .. "." .. string.rep("-", 7) .. "." .. string.rep("-", 12) .. ".") end SendNoEcho("") end
function edit(name) if is_speedwalking then Note("You are already speedwalking. Please cancel the current speedwalk before editing a speedwalk.") else name = Trim(name or "") if all_speedwalks[name] then speedwalk_editor.show(name) else Note("There is not a speedwalk with the name '" .. name .. "'.") end end end
function delete(name) if is_speedwalking then Note("You are already speedwalking. Please cancel the current speedwalk before deleting a speedwalk.") else if all_speedwalks[name] then if utils.msgbox("Are you sure you want to delete the speedwalk '" .. name .. "'?", "Delete Speedwalk", "yesno", "?") == "yes" then all_speedwalks[name] = nil serialization_helper.SetSerializedVariable("advanced_speedwalks", all_speedwalks) Note("Deleted advanced speedwalk '" .. name .. "'.") else Note("Aborted deletion of speedwalk '" .. name .. "'.") end else Note("There is not a speedwalk called '" .. name .. "'.") end end end
function getLongestName() local longest_name = 0 for name in pairs(all_speedwalks) do if name and #name > longest_name then longest_name = #name end end return longest_name end
function showHelp() Note() ColourNote("silver", "black", world.GetPluginInfo(world.GetPluginID(), 3)) Note() SendNoEcho("") end
